channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T13:43Z — 1353 outages, 50,824 customers, 831 fair-weather, 9 DC-proximate
item.description: PA-PPL: 2493 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1501 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NE-EVERSOURCE: 1114 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NJ-ACE: 1090 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)
